stocks.impact_theory: Event: NVIDIA announced accelerated production ramp-up for Blackwell AI GPUs, exceeding expectations amid surging data center demand. Economic implications: Accelerates AI capex cycle, benefiting supply chain and cloud providers; potential GDP boost from AI productivity gains. Market psychology: Triggers FOMO buying as investors fear missing AI supercycle. Historical parallels: Mirrors 2020-2021 GPU shortage frenzy during crypto boom and early AI hype. Analogies: 1) Like the gold rush where picks and shovels (GPUs) profit most; 2) Oil boom for rigs during shale revolution.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web searches reveal analyst upgrades from Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley post-announcement; X semantic search (20 latest posts) shows 85% positive sentiment with high engagement on AI dominance; historical post-news pops average 10% for NVDA.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long positions could yield 15-20% gains in 1-2 weeks on momentum; target $165.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid shorts; limited downside, potential squeeze on hype.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Chip supply chain disruptions, competition from AMD/Intel, valuation bubble burst if AI hype cools.

stocks.justification: High volume news corroborated by multiple sources, strong X buzz, consistent historical patterns.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: Q1 earnings miss on auto margins due to price cuts, but FSD/Robotaxi updates optimistic. Economic implications: Signals EV demand slowdown amid high rates, pressures consumer spending. Market psychology: Polarized - bulls focus on future autonomy, bears on execution risks. Historical parallels: 2022 margin compression led to 65% drop. Analogies: 1) Rollercoaster like GameStop meme stock; 2) Pony express vs. railroads - transition pains.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web news highlights margin erosion; X keyword search (20 latest) 60% negative on delivery misses, despite Elon hype; analyst PT cuts from 40% of coverage.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long only if Robotaxi event delivers; 10% rebound potential.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10-15% downside to $220; momentum fade.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Sudden positive guidance override, regulatory wins for FSD, short squeeze.

stocks.justification: Mixed signals from earnings, high X volatility but clear margin pressure.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: EU court upholds $2B antitrust fine over App Store policies. Economic implications: Erodes monopoly rents, forces pricing changes impacting services revenue. Market psychology: Renewed regulatory fears, profit-taking in megacaps. Historical parallels: Google's 2018 EU fine led to 5% dip. Analogies: 1) Toll booth operator forced to lower fees; 2) Castle walls breached, invaders (competitors) enter.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web coverage on regulatory cascade risks (US DOJ next); X sentiment 70% bearish in latest 20 posts, citing services growth slowdown.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy dip for 5% recovery on iPhone cycle.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Appeal success, strong China sales offset, broader market rally.

stocks.justification: Concrete regulatory event with precedent, uniform negative sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: FAA clears 737 MAX for increased production post-strike resolution. Economic implications: Eases airline supply bottlenecks, supports travel recovery. Market psychology: Relief rally as turnaround narrative strengthens. Historical parallels: Post-2019 MAX grounding recovery +50%. Analogies: 1) Grounded plane back in air; 2) Factory whistle blows after lockout.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Positive FAA news across web; X posts 75% bullish on order backlog, high engagement from aviation accounts.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 12-18% to $210 on backlog fill.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: New safety issues, labor unrest recurrence, Airbus competition.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst but lingering quality concerns temper confidence.

stocks.impact_theory: Event: OPEC+ signals higher output, oil prices drop 4% to $72/bbl. Economic implications: Lowers inflation but squeezes upstream margins. Market psychology: Rotation out of energy into tech. Historical parallels: 2022 OPEC cuts reversed drops. Analogies: 1) Spigot opened wider, flooding cheap oil; 2) Farmer's bounty leads to price crash.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Web reports on supply glut fears; X latest 20 posts 65% bearish on crude futures slide.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long if geopolitics spike oil; 8% upside.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short for 10% to $103 on sustained low oil.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Demand surge from China, Middle East tensions, recession delay.

stocks.justification: Commodity volatility high, but OPEC decision firm.
